title: Waldo (vehicle)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A cybernetic construct of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] design which was used among their [[Submarine/Legends|submersibles]], the '''waldo''' allowed the user to control the external appendages to manipulate the environment under the sea.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']]

[[Category:Cybernetics]]
